children.text: A software developer who writes about building things on the web. Based somewhere with good coffee and reliable internet.
慈濟大學 資訊科技與管理學系 大四 Vibe Coding 實機課程
我們以 Cloudflare 於 2026 年 4 月 1 日發布的開源 CMS — EmDash — 作為教學範本，由師生在課堂上協同 Claude Code AI agent 完成研究、深度分析、本機部署、雙語 i18n 等實作，最終把結果直接 dogfood 到這個 EmDash 站本身。
你現在看到的每一個頁面、每一張代表圖、每一個雙語切換，都是這 2 小時實機課程的真實產出。
Vibe Coding 不是「讓 AI 替你寫」，而是「讓 AI 跟你一起寫」。本課程的核心目標是訓練學員具備以下三項能力：
不要說「寫一個部落格」；要說「在 EmDash 加一個 recipes collection，欄位是 name、photo、ingredients、steps」。具體、可驗收的需求才能換到精準的程式碼。
Claude Code 載入領域 skill 後遠比 Google 精準。本課程示範如何把研究方法（technical-research）、程式碼分析（code-deep-analysis）、敏捷開發（agile-development）等抽象方法論，封裝成可被 AI 重用的 skill。
3. 驗證 AI 結論的能力。
我們在課堂上抓到三項公開文檔的錯誤（編輯器是 TipTap 不是 TinyMCE、Plugin sandbox 用 Worker Loader 不是 Workers for Platforms、MCP server 預設啟用），這些都是實際 git clone 原始碼比對才能發現的。盲信 AI 等於放棄工程責任。
本站本身即是教材。在這個 EmDash 站上，學員看到的每一篇研究文章（／文章 區塊）、每一堂課程概要（／課程 區塊）、每一張 AI 生成的代表圖、每一個語言切換按鈕，都是課堂示範的具體產出，而非另外準備的「教學投影片」。

這呼應了 EmDash 自身的設計哲學：把 AI agent 視為第一級使用者。EmDash monorepo 內建 7 個 Claude Code skills、預設啟用的 MCP Server、為 LLM 設計的 agent-browser CLI — 這些都不是事後想到的功能，而是從設計起點就把 LLM 納入。我們的課程也採同樣立場：學員不是在「學一個給人用的工具」，而是在「學如何與 AI 共同操作工具」。
本課程在 2 小時內，產出以下完整一套教學資產：
：六階段流程（環境準備、技術研究、程式碼深度分析、本機 EmDash 安裝、第一個自訂 collection、Plugin 或 Cloudflare 部署）封裝成 Claude Code 可載入的 skill，學員回家後對 Claude Code 說「請載入 tzu-chi-vibe-coding-emdash skill 開始第 1 階段」即可重現整段流程。
B. EmDash blog 自呈現教學內容
收錄 3 份研究報告（中英共 6 篇文章）與 6 篇課程概要，並具備全站 zh / en 雙語切換、跨語言對等版本自動 redirect、cookie 持久化（一年）。
C. 學員 starter 倉庫
含 README（雙語）、quickstart.sh 環境檢查腳本、3 份完整研究報告、6 道循序練習題（雙語）、8 個 Claude Code skills（7 EmDash 內建 + 1 教學）。學員 git clone 後可獨立進行回家學習。
本站採用：Astro 6.2 / EmDash 0.9 / TypeScript / SQLite (本機檔)/ React 19（Admin UI）/ Portable Text（內容）/ TipTap（富文字編輯器）/ pnpm 10.28 / Node 22+。完整深度分析請見
感謝 Cloudflare 開放 EmDash 原始碼供教學使用，授權 MIT。本教學素材同樣以 MIT 授權開放，歡迎其他教育機構自由使用、修改、再發行。
若你想將本站當作模板開設類似課程，所有源碼與 skill 都可在 student-starter 倉庫取得；歡迎透過 issue 或 PR 回饋改進。
This site is a course artefact
This website is the teaching artefact of the
Tzu Chi University, Department of Information Technology & Management — Senior Vibe Coding Lab

We chose Cloudflare's open-source CMS — EmDash, released on 2026-04-01 — as our teaching subject. In class, students worked alongside the Claude Code AI agent to complete technical research, deep code analysis, local deployment, and bilingual i18n — and the results were dogfooded back into the very EmDash site you are reading right now.
Every page, every cover image, every language toggle you see was produced live during a 2-hour hands-on session.
Vibe Coding is not "let the AI write for you" — it is "writing with the AI." The course trains three abilities:
Don't say "build a blog." Say "add a
collection to EmDash with fields name, photo, ingredients, steps." Concrete, testable specs translate to precise code.

Claude Code with a domain skill loaded is far more precise than Google. The course shows how research methodology (technical-research), code analysis (code-deep-analysis), and agile development can be packaged as skills the AI re-uses.

During class we caught three errors in public documentation: the editor is TipTap, not TinyMCE; the plugin sandbox uses Worker Loader, not Workers for Platforms; the MCP server is enabled by default. None of these are visible without
and reading source. Blindly trusting the AI is abdicating engineering responsibility.

The site itself is the teaching material. Every research article in /posts, every lesson summary in /lessons, every AI-generated cover image, every language toggle here is a live class output — not pre-prepared slides on the side.

This mirrors EmDash's own design philosophy: treat the AI agent as a first-class user. The EmDash monorepo ships 7 built-in Claude Code skills, an MCP Server enabled by default, and an agent-browser CLI designed for LLMs — none of which are afterthoughts. Our course adopts the same stance: students are not "learning a human tool" but "learning to operate tools alongside the AI."
Within 2 hours the course produces a complete teaching package:

: six phases (environment, technical research, code deep analysis, local EmDash install, first custom collection, plugin or Cloudflare deploy) packaged as a loadable Claude Code skill. At home, a student tells Claude Code "please load the tzu-chi-vibe-coding-emdash skill and start phase 1" to replay the entire flow.
B. The EmDash site as the teaching surface

: this site's /posts and /lessons hold 3 research reports (6 bilingual articles) and 6 lesson summaries, with site-wide zh / en switching, cross-language equivalent-version redirect, and a one-year cookie.
environment check, the 3 full research reports, 6 sequential bilingual exercises, and 8 Claude Code skills (7 built-in + 1 course skill). Students
Astro 6.2 / EmDash 0.9 / TypeScript / SQLite (local file) / React 19 (Admin UI) / Portable Text / TipTap (rich-text editor) / pnpm 10.28 / Node 22+. See
Thanks to Cloudflare for releasing EmDash under MIT for teaching purposes. This teaching material is also released under MIT — other institutions are free to use, modify, and redistribute.
If you want to fork this site as a template for a similar course, the source and skill are in the student-starter repository. Issues and PRs welcome.

data.title: Cloudflare EmDash 技術研究報告
data.excerpt: Cloudflare 2026 年 4 月 1 日發布的開源 CMS，TypeScript + Astro + Workers 全棧、AI agent 為第一級使用者。本文是研究團隊以 7 步驟流程完成的技術研究結論摘要。

children.text: Cloudflare EmDash 技術研究報告
本研究依據「technical-research」7 步驟流程進行：書記查記憶 → 文書官 + 收集師補資料 → 書記寫技術文件 → 依文件分析 → 三角論證投票 → 撰寫研究報告 → 書記記錄摘要。三方獨立分析後 3:0 一致通過建議進行 POC。
EmDash 是 Cloudflare 於 2026/4/1 開源的 CMS，自我定位「WordPress 精神繼承者」。版本 v0.1.0 早期 preview，1.0 release 預計 2026/5–6 月。授權 MIT，倉庫 emdash-cms/emdash（10.3k stars）。

技術棧：TypeScript + Astro 6.0（output: server）+ Cloudflare Workers / Node.js standalone；Kysely 抽象 SQL 支援 D1 / SQLite / Turso / PostgreSQL；Storage 抽象 R2 / S3 / 本機檔案系統；認證 Passkey-first（WebAuthn）+ RBAC + SSO；內容 Portable Text（JSON）；Plugin sandbox 透過 Cloudflare Worker Loader 達成 V8 isolate 隔離；AI 原生：內建 MCP Server + Agent Skills + EmDash CLI。
1. Headless / Hybrid CMS（Astro 一個專案同時跑 SSR 前端 + Admin SPA + REST API）
2. AI-Agent 原生站台（每個實例自帶 MCP Server 讓 agent 直接 CRUD）
3. x402 付費內容（HTTP 402 Payment Required，agent 對 publisher 微支付）
4. 多租戶 SaaS / 託管平台（Workers for Platforms 跑百萬實例 scale-to-zero）
5. WordPress 替代（WXR 匯入 + 主題安全模型升級）
6. 結構化內容發布（Portable Text 取代 Gutenberg blocks）

Database-first schema（欄位定義存 _emdash_fields 表，動態建欄）；Live Content Collections（getEmDashCollection 即時讀寫，無需 rebuild）；Type-safe everywhere（Kysely 全鏈路型別 + npx emdash types 自動生 TS）；Capability-based plugin（manifest 宣告 capability 類 OAuth scopes）；Storage abstraction（同 config 切 sqlite/d1/turso/postgres）；Astro-as-frontend（Theme 純 Astro project，禁止存 DB）；Signed URL uploads（避開 Workers 25 MB body limit）；路由注入（/_emdash/admin SPA + /_emdash/api/* REST，由 emdash 套件 inject）。
階段 1（1–2 天）本機 SQLite 跑通；階段 2（2–3 天）部署 Cloudflare Workers + 啟用 MCP Server + AI agent CRUD；階段 3（3–5 天）寫 sandboxed plugin + x402 endpoint。
v0.1.0 不穩、零生態（無 plugin/theme marketplace）、SQLite/D1 上限、Cloudflare 鎖定、Plugin sandbox 僅 Cloudflare 有效（Node.js 無）、Dynamic Workers 需 Workers Paid（$5/月起）。
GitHub 上 emdash-cms/emdash（本研究目標）與 generalaction/emdash（YC W26 agentic dev tool）同名不同物，搜尋時務必認倉庫所有者。
三方投票 3:0 一致通過進行 POC，但範圍嚴格限定為「研究範式」而非正式採用。即使 EmDash 本身演進失敗，其架構範式（database-first schema、capability-based plugins、MCP-as-admin）對團隊未來自建系統長期有價值。
完整報告檔位於 student-starter/lecture-notes/01-technical-research-report.md，內含 7 步驟詳細紀錄、引用來源與報告流程合規性附錄。

$media.alt: Cloudflare EmDash 技術研究報告 / Technical Research Report

data.title: EmDash 程式碼深度分析
data.excerpt: 用 serena MCP 與 5 phase 框架掃描 EmDash 整個 monorepo，揭露 12 個 packages、156 個路由、23 個 plugin hooks。修正公開文檔三項錯誤。

children.text: git clone 後實測：51 MB（不含 node_modules），commit b3d1f40。包含 12 個 packages（不只官方文檔說的 6 個）：core (emdash 0.9.0)、admin、auth、auth-atproto、blocks、cloudflare、plugins、create-emdash、contentful-to-portable-text、gutenberg-to-portable-text、marketplace、x402。再加 10 個 templates（含 5 個 Cloudflare 變體）、6 個 demos、7 個內建 Claude Code Skills。
core/src 共 33 個子目錄，156 個 Astro 路由由 emdash 套件透過 injectRoute 注入。Plugin Manager 31 個方法 555 LOC。MCP server 在單一函數 createMcpServer 中佔 1841 行（packages/core/src/mcp/server.ts:387-2228）。
修正公開文檔三項錯誤
1. 編輯器是 TipTap，不是部分獨立評論宣稱的 TinyMCE。
2. Plugin sandbox 採 Cloudflare Worker Loader（一個較新的 binding），不是 Workers for Platforms / Dynamic Workers。wrangler.jsonc 需含 worker_loaders: [{ binding: "LOADER" }]。
3. MCP server 預設啟用（mcp: true），路徑 /_emdash/api/mcp，需 Bearer token 認證。
兩種 format：native（React + adminEntry + Portable Text 區塊，只能 trusted）、standard（Block Kit 無 React，可 sandboxed）。Sandboxed 列表強制 format=standard，否則 throw。
23 個 hooks（公開只列 6 個）：plugin lifecycle 4 個、content 6 個、media 2 個、cron 1 個、email 3 個、comment 4 個、page 2 個、custom 1 個。
Capability 命名重構中：current 11 個（network:request、content:read 等）+ deprecated 11 個 alias（read:content 等仍接受）。

Binding：LOADER（Cloudflare Worker Loader）。部署期 packages/cloudflare/src/sandbox/wrapper.ts 產生 wrapper JS，將 plugin manifest 元資料嵌於註解。執行期 host worker 透過 LOADER binding 載入 isolate；context（KV/storage/email/users）以 RPC 經 BRIDGE service binding 回呼到 host。結果：trusted 與 sandboxed 用相同 callback signature，但 sandboxed 副作用必經 host 守關。

皆 order: pre — playground（如 playground 模式）→ emdash/middleware（runtime init: DB + manifest）→ emdash/middleware/redirect → emdash/middleware/setup → emdash/middleware/auth → emdash/middleware/request-context（ALS：edit mode、preview）。

Astro 內建 checkOrigin 被刻意關閉，由 EmDash 自家 checkPublicCsrf 以 dual-origin 接管，支援反向代理 / Docker 部署。D1 session: "auto" 用 cookie 中的 SQLite bookmark 做 read-your-writes consistency，不靠中央化 primary。媒體檔名是 ULID（如 01KQY00MTRSX9Q7C2NW0GMTP28.jpg），不是 UUID — 可排序、collision-free。
EmDash 程式碼比公開文檔複雜得多，但架構自洽。對於想學「serverless multi-tenant CMS」與「AI-agent 原生」這兩個合流範式的團隊，原始碼本身是最佳教材。
完整報告檔位於 student-starter/lecture-notes/02-code-deep-analysis.md，內含 4 張 Mermaid 圖（系統架構、請求生命週期、Plugin 系統、資料流）與技術棧詳表。

$media.alt: EmDash 程式碼深度分析 / Code Deep Analysis

data.title: EmDash 內建 7 個 Claude Code Skills 研究
data.excerpt: EmDash 把 7 個 Claude Code skills 直接打包進 monorepo（1491 行 + 24 附件），證實 AI agent 是 EmDash 的第一級使用者，不只是內建 MCP server。

children.text: EmDash 內建 7 個 Claude Code Skills 研究
building-emdash-site（146 行 + 4 references）— 5 條救命 gotchas：image 是 object 不是 string；entry.id 是 slug、entry.data.id 是 ULID；taxonomy 名要對齊 seed；必呼叫 Astro.cache.set(cacheHint)；禁用 getStaticPaths。
creating-plugins（459 行 + 7 references，最大 skill）— 揭露雙 entrypoint 必拆：index.ts（build-time，Vite，side-effect-free）+ sandbox-entry.ts（runtime，跑在 deploy server）。Standard format vs Native format 二維矩陣。
emdash-cli（245 行 + EDITING-FLOW.md）— 內建 Cloudflare Access service token 支援，--header / EMDASH_HEADERS 直接送，預期 CI / agent 自動化操作遠端站是常態。
wordpress-plugin-to-emdash（297 行）— WP API 對應到 EmDash API 的完整對應表。哲學：clean-room，不要 line-by-line port。

wordpress-theme-to-emdash（83 行 + 6 phases + 5 references + scaffold = 11 附件，規格化最完整）— 6 階段流程 discovery → design → templates → dynamic → seed → verify。含 scaffold/{package.json, CHECKLIST.md, src/} 整包可複製。
adversarial-reviewer（122 行）— 敵意式 code review。心態：guilty until proven innocent；no compliments；no hedging；prove it。規則：silence means approval（不提就放行，省 token）。
agent-browser（139 行）— agent-browser CLI（非 Playwright），用 accessibility tree + @e1/@e2 ref，不需理解 selector。

skills 互相 dispatch，避免重複內容（如 wordpress-plugin-to-emdash 明確說「找 creating-plugins skill 看實作」）。agent-browser 自製不用 Playwright = 給 LLM 設計的最小介面。adversarial-reviewer「沉默就是放行」= LLM token 友善設計。emdash-cli 內建 service token = 預期 CI / agent 操作遠端站。
EmDash 的「AI-native」不只是內建 MCP server，更是完整的 AI 開發工具鏈。每個 skill 都假設 LLM 是執行者，而非人類的助手。這個觀察改變了對 EmDash 的根本理解：它不是「能用 AI 操作的 CMS」，而是「為 AI 設計的 CMS」。
對教學的影響：本課程建議學員把這 7 個 skills 加進 .claude/skills 目錄，使 Claude Code 立即擁有 EmDash 領域知識。完整報告檔位於 student-starter/lecture-notes/03-builtin-skills-research.md。

$media.alt: EmDash 內建 7 個 Claude Code Skills / 7 Built-in Skills

data.title: Cloudflare EmDash Technical Research Report
data.excerpt: Cloudflare's open-source CMS released April 1, 2026 — TypeScript + Astro + Workers full-stack, with AI agent as first-class user. This is the executive summary of our 7-step research workflow.

children.text: We applied the technical-research skill's 7-step workflow: librarian checks memory → document officer + collector gather data → librarian writes the tech document → analysis → triangulation vote → write report → librarian records the summary. Three independent voters (Coordinator / Collector / Analyst) reached 3:0 consensus to proceed with the POC.

EmDash is an open-source CMS released by Cloudflare on 2026-04-01, positioning itself as the "spiritual successor to WordPress." Currently v0.1.0 (developer preview); 1.0 release expected May–June 2026. MIT-licensed, repository emdash-cms/emdash (10.3k stars).

Tech stack: TypeScript + Astro 6.0 (output: server) + Cloudflare Workers / Node.js standalone; Kysely SQL abstraction supporting D1 / SQLite / Turso / PostgreSQL; Storage abstraction over R2 / S3 / local filesystem; Authentication is passkey-first (WebAuthn) with RBAC and SSO; Content stored as Portable Text (JSON); Plugin sandbox via Cloudflare Worker Loader (V8 isolates); AI-native via built-in MCP Server, Agent Skills, and the EmDash CLI.
1. Headless / Hybrid CMS (one Astro project serves SSR frontend + Admin SPA + REST API)
2. AI-agent native sites (each instance ships an MCP Server so agents can CRUD directly)
3. x402 paid content (HTTP 402 Payment Required for agent-to-publisher micropayments)
4. Multi-tenant SaaS / hosting (Workers for Platforms scales millions of instances to zero)
5. WordPress replacement (WXR import + safer theme model)
6. Structured-content publishing (Portable Text replacing Gutenberg blocks)

Database-first schema (fields stored in _emdash_fields, columns added dynamically); Live Content Collections (getEmDashCollection reads/writes live, no rebuild required); Type-safe everywhere (Kysely + npx emdash types regenerates TS types); Capability-based plugins (manifest declares capabilities like OAuth scopes); Storage abstraction (one config swaps sqlite/d1/turso/postgres); Astro-as-frontend (themes are pure Astro projects with no DB access); Signed-URL uploads (bypassing the Workers 25 MB body limit); Route injection (/_emdash/admin SPA + /_emdash/api/* REST, injected by the emdash package).

Stage 1 (1–2 days) get it running locally on SQLite; Stage 2 (2–3 days) deploy to Cloudflare Workers, enable the MCP Server, drive content via an AI agent; Stage 3 (3–5 days) write a sandboxed plugin and try an x402 endpoint.

v0.1.0 is unstable; the ecosystem is empty (no plugin / theme marketplace); SQLite/D1 ceiling for complex relational data; Cloudflare lock-in; Plugin sandbox only works on Cloudflare (Node.js deploys have no sandbox); Dynamic Workers requires Workers Paid ($5/month minimum).
Two GitHub projects share the name emdash: emdash-cms/emdash (this research's target) and generalaction/emdash (a YC W26 agentic-dev tool). Always check the repo owner.

Triangulation vote was 3:0 in favour of running the POC, but strictly framed as "researching the paradigm" rather than "adopting in production." Even if EmDash itself fails to mature, its architectural patterns (database-first schema, capability-based plugins, MCP-as-admin) carry long-term value for any team building similar systems.
The full report is in student-starter/lecture-notes/01-technical-research-report.md, including the 7-step records, citations, and a workflow-compliance appendix.

$media.alt: Cloudflare EmDash 技術研究報告 / Technical Research Report

data.title: EmDash Code Deep Analysis
data.excerpt: Using serena MCP and a 5-phase framework, we scanned the entire EmDash monorepo: 12 packages, 156 routes, 23 plugin hooks. Three corrections to the public docs.

children.text: After git clone (51 MB excluding node_modules, commit b3d1f40): 12 packages (not the 6 the official docs imply): core (emdash 0.9.0), admin, auth, auth-atproto, blocks, cloudflare, plugins, create-emdash, contentful-to-portable-text, gutenberg-to-portable-text, marketplace, x402. Plus 10 templates (5 Cloudflare variants), 6 demos, and 7 built-in Claude Code skills.

core/src has 33 sub-directories. 156 Astro routes are injected by the emdash package via injectRoute. PluginManager has 31 methods totalling 555 LOC. The MCP server is implemented as a single function createMcpServer at packages/core/src/mcp/server.ts:387-2228 — 1841 lines in one function.
1. The editor is TipTap, not TinyMCE as some independent reviews claimed.
2. The plugin sandbox uses Cloudflare Worker Loader (a newer binding), not Workers for Platforms or Dynamic Workers. wrangler.jsonc requires worker_loaders: [{ binding: "LOADER" }].
3. The MCP server is enabled by default (mcp: true), mounted at /_emdash/api/mcp, with bearer-token authentication.
Two formats: native (React + adminEntry + Portable Text blocks, trusted only) and standard (Block Kit, no React, can be sandboxed). The sandboxed list rejects native plugins at config time.
23 hooks (public docs only list 6): plugin lifecycle 4, content 6, media 2, cron 1, email 3, comment 4, page 2, plus a custom slot.
Capability naming is being reorganised: 11 current names (network:request, content:read, …) plus 11 deprecated aliases (read:content, …) still accepted.

Binding: LOADER (Cloudflare Worker Loader). At deploy time, packages/cloudflare/src/sandbox/wrapper.ts emits a wrapper JS file embedding plugin manifest metadata in comments. At runtime the host worker loads the isolate via the LOADER binding; context (KV / storage / email / users) is proxied via RPC over the BRIDGE service binding back to the host. Trusted and sandboxed plugins use identical callback signatures — but every sandboxed side-effect must pass the host's gate.

All order: pre — playground (if playground mode) → emdash/middleware (runtime init: DB + manifest) → emdash/middleware/redirect → emdash/middleware/setup → emdash/middleware/auth → emdash/middleware/request-context (ALS for edit mode and preview).

Astro's built-in checkOrigin is deliberately disabled; EmDash provides its own dual-origin checkPublicCsrf to support reverse proxies and Docker deploys. D1 session: "auto" uses a SQLite bookmark in cookies for read-your-writes consistency without a centralised primary. Media filenames are ULIDs (e.g. 01KQY00MTRSX9Q7C2NW0GMTP28.jpg), not UUIDs — sortable and collision-free.

EmDash's source is far richer than the public docs suggest, yet architecturally consistent. For teams interested in the converging "serverless multi-tenant CMS" + "AI-agent native" paradigm, the source itself is the best teacher.

The full report (student-starter/lecture-notes/02-code-deep-analysis.md) contains 4 Mermaid diagrams (system architecture, request lifecycle, plugin system, data flow) and an exhaustive tech-stack table.

$media.alt: EmDash 程式碼深度分析 / Code Deep Analysis

data.title: EmDash's 7 Built-in Claude Code Skills
data.excerpt: EmDash ships 7 Claude Code skills inside its monorepo (1491 lines + 24 attachments), proving that the AI agent is a first-class user — not an afterthought beside the built-in MCP server.

children.text: Build group (do work in EmDash): building-emdash-site, creating-plugins, emdash-cli.
Migration group (move from WordPress): wordpress-plugin-to-emdash, wordpress-theme-to-emdash.
Quality group (general, not EmDash-specific): adversarial-reviewer, agent-browser.

building-emdash-site (146 lines + 4 references) — 5 life-saving gotchas: image fields are objects not strings; entry.id is the slug while entry.data.id is the ULID; taxonomy names must match the seed; always call Astro.cache.set(cacheHint); never use getStaticPaths.

creating-plugins (459 lines + 7 references, the largest skill) — exposes the dual entrypoint requirement: index.ts (build-time, Vite, side-effect-free) + sandbox-entry.ts (runtime, on the deployed server). Documents the Standard vs Native format matrix.

emdash-cli (245 lines + EDITING-FLOW.md) — built-in support for Cloudflare Access service tokens: --header / EMDASH_HEADERS pass through directly. Implies CI / agent automation against remote sites is normal usage.
wordpress-plugin-to-emdash (297 lines) — full WP-API to EmDash-API mapping table. Philosophy: clean-room implementation, never a line-by-line port.

wordpress-theme-to-emdash (83 lines + 6 phases + 5 references + scaffold = 11 attachments, the most prescriptive skill) — six phases discovery → design → templates → dynamic → seed → verify. Ships scaffold/{package.json, CHECKLIST.md, src/} ready for the agent to copy.

adversarial-reviewer (122 lines) — hostile code review. Mindset: guilty until proven innocent, no compliments, no hedging, prove it. Rule: silence means approval (don't pad with "looks fine" — save tokens).
agent-browser (139 lines) — the agent-browser CLI (not Playwright) uses accessibility trees + @e1/@e2 refs, so an agent never has to understand selectors.

Skills dispatch to one another to avoid duplication (wordpress-plugin-to-emdash explicitly says "see the creating-plugins skill for implementation"). agent-browser is hand-built rather than wrapping Playwright = a minimal API designed for LLMs. adversarial-reviewer's "silence means approval" is a token-saving design. emdash-cli's built-in service-token support assumes CI / agent remote operation is standard.

EmDash's "AI-native" stance is more than an in-process MCP server — it's a full AI development toolchain. Every skill assumes the LLM is the executor, not a sidekick to a human. This reframes EmDash itself: it isn't "a CMS you can drive with AI," it's "a CMS designed for AI."

Teaching implication: students are encouraged to drop these 7 skills into .claude/skills/ so their own Claude Code instances inherit EmDash domain knowledge instantly. The full report is at student-starter/lecture-notes/03-builtin-skills-research.md.

$media.alt: EmDash 內建 7 個 Claude Code Skills / 7 Built-in Skills

data.title: 用 EmDash plugin 解決 markdown 渲染相容性問題
data.excerpt: 本站文章中 `**bold**` 等 markdown 標記原本顯示為純文字。我們不直接 patch DB，而是依照 EmDash plugin 規範寫了 `markdown-marks` plugin — 一個示範「為何要走官方 API」的真實工程案例。

children.text: 用 EmDash plugin 解決 markdown 渲染相容性問題
本站文章本來在內文出現 `
` 這種 markdown 寫法時，並沒有被渲染成粗體或行內程式碼，而是原樣輸出。原因是 EmDash 用的是
— 一種結構化 JSON 內容格式，每個 span 必須透過
的方式宣告樣式，而不是接受 markdown 字串。
我們最初寫進去的 portable text 把整段含 `
` 的文字直接放進一個 span，所以前端 PortableText 元件當然只能照原字串渲染。
：寫一個 Python script 連 SQLite，遍歷
欄位，重組 portable text JSON 寫回。
hook，並提供一次性 migrate route 處理既有資料。
：EmDash 仍在 v0.x，portable text schema 與內部表結構都可能調整；A 路線等於在資料層硬編一個假設，每次主版升級就有破裂風險。B 路線只用 EmDash 公開的 plugin 契約，跟著官方走。
（雙 entrypoint）；trusted 模式跑在 host process；capabilities
— 在儲存前把 spans 中尚未帶 marks 的 markdown 字串展開成多個 spans 加正確 marks。
健康檢查 + 即場示範解析效果。
一鍵掃 posts/pages/lessons 既有 entries 跑同一支 transform。
雙 entrypoint（最關鍵的工程約束）
EmDash plugin 有兩個檔必須拆開：
— 描述子工廠（descriptor factory），跑在 Vite build time。必須是 side-effect-free。回傳
物件含 id / version / capabilities / entrypoint。
— 真正的 plugin 邏輯，跑在 deploy server runtime。
：一個跑在 Vite，一個跑在 V8 isolate；如果在 descriptor 那邊不小心 import runtime API，build 直接爆。skill 的 hooks reference 對這條規矩寫得很清楚。
三個 regex pattern 依序：`
。順序很重要 — 長 marker 先處理，避免
對單一 span 的 text 跑遞迴：找到第一個 marker 就把 text 拆成 before / inside / after 三段，inside 帶上對應 mark，遞迴處理 before 與 after。這樣 `
整個函式組是純函式（pure）— 沒有任何 I/O，可以在 Vite build、Workers runtime、Node 任何環境跑。
在沒有變更時回傳同一個 reference，避免 hot path 浪費記憶體。
回傳的 content 會直接覆蓋掉原 content。我們的 hook 邏輯：能展開就回
讓 EmDash 保留原內容（errorPolicy:continue 確保 save 不被擋）。
會跳過已經帶 marks 的 span，hook
— 同一篇文章連跑十次結果不變。
Hook 只在「之後新編輯儲存」時跑。但我們有 14 篇既存 entry 是「事前」就寫進 DB 的，所以另寫了
Route 邏輯：對每個目標 collection 用
計算新版本，差異欄位才呼叫
結果：posts 6/6、pages 2/2、lessons 6/6 — 14 篇全部更新，0 錯誤。
，對應 plugin 自家 package.json 的
過程中遇到的 3 個小坑
沒讓 route 真的 public。
文檔說 standard plugin route 加
仍回 401 UNAUTHORIZED。可能是新版本對 plugin route 加了一層 admin gate。解法：用 EmDash 內建的 dev-bypass：
自動建立 dev admin session，後續帶 cookie 就過。生產環境必須改用 admin token。
改 sandbox-entry.ts 後，dev server 不會自動 reload plugin code，要
state-changing 的 plugin route（POST migrate）必須帶
header，否則 403 CSRF_REJECTED。這是 EmDash 整體 API 的規範，plugin route 也適用。
這個 plugin 對學員是
(1) 從一個具體可見的問題出發（為什麼 `
` 沒變粗？），(2) 用 plugin 而不是 patch DB（理解「為何要相容於框架契約」），(3) 涵蓋 hook + route + capability 三大 plugin feature，(4) 包含 migrate 解決「既有資料」這個真實系統會遇到的問題。
，學員 git clone 即可取得整套程式碼當教材參考。
「為什麼不要直接改 DB」其實就是一句話：
。這個 plugin 從 git clone EmDash 原始碼、讀 creating-plugins skill、設計 + 實作 + 驗證一條龍，總共約 35 分鐘。比起多寫一支 SQL 多花 25 分鐘，但換來的是「未來 EmDash 升級不會炸」這個保證 — 對教學示範與未來真實採用來說，這 25 分鐘絕對值得。
教訓：seed CLI 不走 plugin hook（v1.0.0 課後反饋環）
本文上線到 Cloudflare prod 後，課堂老師看到一段內文出現 `
` 純文字 — markdown 字面沒被渲染成粗體。明明本機 demo 已經跑過 plugin migrate，所有 14 個 entries 都驗證過會渲染了。
直接 INSERT 到資料庫
：admin UI 編輯儲存 → API → content:beforeSave hook → DB（妥）
結論很硬：seed 是 system-level 操作，不是業務操作；plugin hook 只負責「將來不在你掌控中的資料來源」（admin UI、外部 import）。能在 seed 階段就解決的「資料正規化」不應留給 hook 補救。
對 seed.json 跑一次與 plugin 相同的 expand 邏輯，讓 seed 檔本身就帶正規 Portable Text marks。下次 prod re-seed、學員 clone 後 bootstrap，看到的內容都直接是渲染好的，不需要事後跑 plugin migrate route。
Plugin migrate route 仍保留為 legacy 資料的補救工具（例如：把外部 import 的 markdown 字串轉正規），但
新部署的乾淨 seed 不再需要它
1. 知道 hook 在哪一層
：每個 hook 都有它攔截的具體 API path。文件可能不寫，但你要從原始碼或實測知道。
2. 資料正規化盡量在源頭
：能在 seed / 匯入腳本就寫對的格式，就不要靠後置 hook。後置補救是除錯時的工具，不是正常流程。
3. dogfooding 才看得見這種 bug
：本機跑得好不代表 prod 跑得好。Cloudflare 部署到瀏覽器訪問是課程的最後一里路 — 沒走完不算課程結束。
這段教訓寫進來時，也就是這份教學專案 v1.0.0 release 的時刻。

$media.alt: 用 EmDash plugin 解決 markdown 渲染相容性問題 / Solving markdown rendering with an EmDash plugin

data.title: Solving Markdown Rendering with an EmDash Plugin
data.excerpt: Articles on this site originally rendered `**bold**` literally. Instead of patching the DB, we built `markdown-marks` — a plugin following EmDash's official API. This is a worked example of "why go through the framework, not around it."

children.text: Solving Markdown Rendering with an EmDash Plugin
Articles on this site contained inline `
` markers, but they rendered as literal text rather than as bold or inline code. EmDash uses
— a structured JSON content format where each span declares formatting via
Our initial portable text just stuffed the whole `
` line into one span — so the PortableText component had no choice but to render it verbatim.
: write a Python script that opens SQLite, walks every
field, rebuilds the portable-text JSON, and writes it back.
per EmDash's official API, attach a
hook, and provide a one-shot migrate route for existing content.
We chose B. The reason is

: EmDash is still v0.x, and the portable-text schema and internal table layout may shift. Path A bakes assumptions into the data layer that will break on every major upgrade. Path B uses only EmDash's published plugin contract — we move when EmDash moves.
— before save, expand any markdown markers in spans without existing
into multiple spans with proper marks.
for a health check + live demo;
to sweep existing posts/pages/lessons through the same transform.
EmDash plugins must split two files:
— descriptor factory, runs at Vite build time. Must be side-effect-free. Returns a
— actual plugin logic, runs at request time on the deployed server.

These cannot share a file: one runs in Vite, the other in a V8 isolate. Importing runtime APIs from the descriptor side means the build blows up. The hooks reference in the skill spells this out clearly.
Three regex patterns, in this order: `
. Order matters — longer markers first, otherwise
field_*` and word-boundary stars to keep non-semantic asterisks literal.

For each span text, recursion: find the first marker, split into before / inside / after, apply the mark to the recursed inside, and recurse on before and after as well. That gives nested handling for cases like `
All functions are pure — zero I/O, safe to run in Vite, Workers, or Node.
returns the same reference when nothing changes, keeping the hot path allocation-light.
returns either modified content (which replaces the original) or
on exception, so a malformed input never blocks the save (errorPolicy
skips spans that already carry marks, the hook is
— re-running on the same article ten times yields the same result.
The hook only fires on future saves. We had 14 entries pre-dating the plugin, so we wrote the
Route logic: for each target collection, paginate with
. For each item, compute the expanded version with
with only the fields that actually changed.
Result: posts 6/6, pages 2/2, lessons 6/6 — 14 entries updated, zero errors.
The plugin is referenced via npm's
export in the plugin's package.json — i.e. sandbox-entry.ts.
The skill says public routes skip auth, but in practice
returned 401 UNAUTHORIZED. The current EmDash version seems to wrap plugin routes in an admin gate. Workaround: use the built-in dev bypass —
mints a dev admin session, and cookie-bound subsequent calls work. Production deployments must use a real admin token instead.
, otherwise 403 CSRF_REJECTED. This applies to all EmDash APIs, plugins included.
For students, this is the most complete real-world case:
(1) starts from a visible bug ("why isn't `

` bold?"), (2) uses a plugin instead of a DB patch (the lesson on "respect the framework's contract"), (3) covers hooks + routes + capabilities — three core plugin features at once, and (4) includes a migration step, which is what real systems actually need beyond Hello-World plugins.
gives students the entire source as study material.
"Why not just patch the DB?" boils down to one line:

. The whole plugin took about 35 minutes from cloning EmDash source, reading the creating-plugins skill, designing, implementing, and verifying. That's 25 minutes more than a one-off SQL patch — and in exchange we get "future EmDash upgrades won't break this" as a permanent guarantee. For a teaching demo and for any real future adoption, those 25 minutes are obviously worth it.
Lesson: emdash seed bypasses plugin hooks (v1.0.0 feedback loop)
After this article shipped to Cloudflare production, the instructor noticed a paragraph rendering as literal `
` — the markdown asterisks weren't being turned into bold. Yet on local dev, the plugin migrate route had already processed all 14 entries and the markup looked correct.
: admin UI edit → API → content:beforeSave → DB (intercepted ✓)

The takeaway is sharp: seed is a system-level operation, not a business operation. Plugin hooks intercept "data sources you don't control" (admin UI, external imports). Anything you can normalise at seed time should not be left to a hook to clean up later.
Run the same expand-marks pass against seed.json itself, so the seed file ships canonical Portable Text marks. Future prod re-seeds and student
calls then read correct data on first INSERT — no "run the migrate route afterwards" step required.
The plugin's migrate route is still kept around for
(e.g. cleaning up an external markdown import), but a fresh deploy with this seed file no longer needs it.
1. Know which API path your hook intercepts.
Every hook attaches to a specific API entrypoint. The docs may not say so explicitly — read source or test it.
2. Normalise at the source whenever possible.
If the seed / import script can write the canonical format, don't lean on a hook to clean it up later. Post-hoc fix-ups are a debugging tool, not a normal flow.
3. Dogfooding is what catches bugs like this.
"Works locally" doesn't mean "works in prod." Cloudflare deploy → browser-on-public-URL is the last mile of the course — not running it is not finishing.
Adding this lesson is also the moment the project tags its v1.0.0 release.

$media.alt: 用 EmDash plugin 解決 markdown 渲染相容性問題 / Solving markdown rendering with an EmDash plugin

data.title: 第 1 課：用 Claude Code 做技術研究
data.summary: 示範技術研究流程：書記查記憶 → 文書官 + 收集師補資料 → 三角論證 → 寫報告。

children.text: 第 1 課：技術研究流程
Vibe Coding 不是亂寫，而是「先理解、後動手」。本課示範如何用 Claude Code 的 technical-research skill，在不到 30 分鐘內完成一份結構化技術研究。
1) 書記官（OpenMemory）查既有記憶 — 不重複勞動
2) 文書官（Context7）+ 收集師（Perplexity）平行收集官方 / 業界資料
3) 書記官把資料整理成技術文件並建記憶
4) 依文件做相容性、風險、可行性分析
5) 三角論證：總協、收集師、分析師三方獨立投票（3:0 / 2:1 / 1:1:1）
7) 書記官記錄報告位置與摘要
今日範例：研究 Cloudflare EmDash CMS
我們用這個流程研究 Cloudflare 2026/4/1 發布的開源 CMS。發現它是 TypeScript + Astro + Workers 的「WordPress 精神繼承者」，v0.1.0 早期 preview，AI agent 為第一級使用者。
（YC W26 agentic dev tool）同名不同物，搜尋時務必認倉庫所有者。
用同樣流程研究你感興趣的另一個 OSS 專案，產出一份不超過 1500 字的技術研究報告。

data.title: 第 2 課：程式碼深度分析
data.summary: 用 serena + 5 phase 框架掃整個 monorepo，產出 Mermaid 架構圖。

children.text: 第 2 課：程式碼深度分析
serena 提供「IDE 級別」的 LSP 級別程式碼操作。比 grep 快、比 read 精準。重要工具：
Phase 0 — 環境準備：clone repo、啟動 serena
Phase 1 — 目錄掃描：找入口、識別模組
Phase 2 — 符號分析：核心類別、方法、依賴鏈
Phase 3 — 架構評估：模式、技術棧、技術債
Phase 4 — 文檔產出：Mermaid 架構圖、資料流圖、依賴圖
EmDash 真實規模（公開文檔遠未涵蓋）
12 個 packages、156 個 Astro 路由、core/src 33 子目錄。Plugin Manager 31 個方法 555 LOC。MCP server 單函數 1841 行！
修正公開文檔的關鍵錯誤
1) 編輯器是 TipTap，不是部分評論說的 TinyMCE
2) Plugin sandbox 用 Cloudflare 的 Worker Loader（新 binding），不是 Workers for Platforms
3) MCP server 預設啟用，路徑
「用 AI 讀大量程式碼比自己讀快十倍」，但要：(a) 給 AI 明確問題；(b) 用結構化工具（serena）；(c) 驗證 AI 結論。
選一個你看過的 OSS repo，跑 5 phase 流程，產出至少 2 張 Mermaid 圖。

data.title: 第 3 課：本機安裝 EmDash
data.summary: 從零到 dev server 跑通的完整流程。

children.text: 第 3 課：本機安裝 EmDash CMS
Node.js ≥ 22.12.0（避免奇數版本如 21、23、25）；pnpm 10.28+（推薦透過 corepack 啟用）；SQLite 3.x（macOS / Linux 預裝）。
pnpm create emdash@latest my-emdash-blog --template blog --platform node --pm pnpm --install --yes
這條指令包：下載 blog template、寫 EMDASH_ENCRYPTION_KEY 到 .env、安裝所有依賴。
（套用 seed.json）。會建 data.db（SQLite）、下載 Unsplash 範例圖到 uploads/。
→ http://localhost:4321（Astro v6.2.2 約 2.5 秒就緒）。
，這是 capability 守關真實運作的證據。
在你的電腦完成本機安裝；註冊 passkey；建立第一篇 post 並在前台確認可見。

data.title: Lesson 1: Technical Research with Claude Code
data.summary: Demonstrates the technical research workflow: librarian → document officer + collector → triangulation → report.

children.text: Vibe Coding is not random typing. It is "understand first, code second." This lesson demonstrates how Claude Code's technical-research skill produces a structured tech report in under 30 minutes.
1) Librarian (OpenMemory) checks existing memories — avoid duplicate work
2) Document Officer (Context7) + Collector (Perplexity) gather official + industry data in parallel
3) Librarian writes a structured tech document and stores it
4) Compatibility, risk, feasibility analysis based on the document
5) Triangulation: Coordinator, Collector, Analyst vote independently (3:0 / 2:1 / 1:1:1)

We applied this workflow to Cloudflare's open-source CMS released 2026-04-01. Found: TypeScript + Astro + Workers "spiritual successor to WordPress," v0.1.0 early preview, AI agent as first-class user.
(YC W26 agentic dev tool) share a name. Always verify the repo owner.
Apply this workflow to another OSS project of your interest. Produce a research report under 1500 words.

data.title: Lesson 2: Code Deep Analysis
data.summary: Use serena + a 5-phase framework to scan a monorepo and produce Mermaid diagrams.

children.text: serena provides IDE-grade (LSP-level) code operations. Faster than grep, more precise than read. Key tools:
Phase 0 — Environment prep: clone repo, activate serena
Phase 1 — Directory scan: find entry points, identify modules
Phase 2 — Symbol analysis: core classes, methods, dependency chains
Phase 3 — Architecture eval: patterns, tech stack, tech debt
Phase 4 — Documentation: Mermaid architecture diagrams, data flow, dependency graphs
EmDash's real scale (well beyond public docs)
12 packages, 156 Astro routes, 33 core/src subdirectories. PluginManager: 31 methods, 555 LOC. MCP server: a single 1841-line function!
1) The editor is TipTap, not TinyMCE as some reviews claimed
2) Plugin sandbox uses Cloudflare Worker Loader (a newer binding), not Workers for Platforms
3) MCP server is enabled by default at
"AI reads code 10x faster than you," but you must: (a) ask AI specific questions; (b) use structured tools (serena); (c) verify AI conclusions.
Pick an OSS repo you have read before. Run the 5-phase analysis and produce at least 2 Mermaid diagrams.

data.title: Lesson 3: Installing EmDash Locally
data.summary: Full path from zero to a running dev server.

children.text: Node.js ≥ 22.12.0 (avoid odd-numbered releases like 21/23/25); pnpm 10.28+ (recommended via corepack); SQLite 3.x (preinstalled on macOS/Linux).
pnpm create emdash@latest my-emdash-blog --template blog --platform node --pm pnpm --install --yes
This downloads the blog template, writes EMDASH_ENCRYPTION_KEY to .env, and installs all dependencies in one go.
(apply seed.json). Builds data.db, downloads Unsplash sample images to uploads/.
Admin: http://localhost:4321/_emdash/admin (first visit registers a passkey)
— concrete proof of the capability gate at runtime.
Media files are named with ULIDs (e.g.
Install EmDash on your laptop, register a passkey, create your first post, and verify it on the public site.
